title: lepidium meyeri subsp. meyeri
intro: Lepidium meyeri subsp. meyeri, also known as cress or garden cress, is a fast-growing, annual plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, its seeds and leaves are rich in antioxidants and have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal preparations. Lepidium meyeri subsp. meyeri can be prepared as a tea, used as a spice in cooking, or even consumed raw, allowing individuals to harness its potential health benefits.
